title: "Is Heaven A Physician?"
content:
Is Heaven a physician?
    They say that He can heal;
    But medicine posthumous
    Is unavailable.


    Is Heaven an exchequer?
    They speak of what we owe;
    But that negotiation
    I 'm not a party to.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled ""Is Heaven A Physician?"", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
